title: Executive Assistant
published: Published on 10 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Move2Cloud Tunisia is looking for an Executive Assistant to strengthen its administrative team and support senior management in its daily activities. You will be the key point of contact between management and the internal teams, partners, and clients.
desc.2: You will work in a dynamic environment, at the heart of a cloud transformation consulting firm, with regular interactions with our teams based in France.
mission.1: Manage the executive calendar: scheduling meetings, travel, and conferences
mission.2: Draft and format correspondence, minutes, presentations, and reports
mission.3: Administrative management of contracts, invoices, and official documents
mission.4: Coordination with HR, sales, and technical teams
mission.5: Reception and liaison with clients, partners, and service providers
mission.6: Monitor management indicators and prepare dashboards
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in administration, management, or business
profile.2: 2 to 5 years of experience in a similar role, ideally in an IT services company
profile.3: Excellent written and spoken French (C1 level minimum)
profile.5: Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
profile.6: Rigour, discretion, proactivity, and organisational skills
profile.7: Excellent interpersonal skills and ability to work under pressure
benefit.1: Permanent contract (CDI) with a 3-month probationary period, renewable once
benefit.2: Attractive compensation based on profile and experience
